{"id":"smallhold-085","title":"verify_credentials: authed account object, exact Mastodon response shape","description":"Return the full Account object for the authenticated persona. This is the endpoint clients call immediately after login. The response shape must be an exact match to mastodon.social verify_credentials response — clients depend on specific fields being present.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to GET mastodon.social/api/v1/accounts/verify_credentials and catalog every field in the response as the oracle.

Test discipline: capture mastodon.social verify_credentials response as the oracle; generate a local Account object and compare structure with all top-level fields present and correct types; Account.id is a quoted string (not number); Account.acct is 'username' (no @domain) for local accounts; Account.source is present (only on verify_credentials, not on public account endpoints); Account.avatar and Account.header are absolute URLs. Never use the implementation as its own oracle.

Defensive programming: never return private_key_pem in any endpoint and assert this in a test; Account.bot is false unless accounts.bot=1; followers_count, following_count, statuses_count computed from DB with COUNT not cached (can drift); no .unwrap() outside tests; all errors Result<T, AppError>.","acceptance_criteria":"Response shape matches mastodon.social oracle with all fields; id is quoted string not number; acct is username-only without @domain; source field present; private_key_pem never in response (asserted by test)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:32:16Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:32:16Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2io","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:32:18Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
